summary: Iteration 83 - REDD+, SSRTE, ICI KPIs with REAL Seed Data Testing Complete. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified with real data. Dashboard displays subscription banner, REDD+ widget with 17 visits/4.9 score/18 farmers, SSRTE widget with 18 visits/20 children/80% coverage, ICI remediation with 7 cases/3 resolved/2 in progress. Sync tests verified: creating REDD+ and SSRTE visits increments dashboard counts.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Backend GET /api/cooperative/dashboard-kpis returns 200 with real seed data
PASS: REDD+ total_visits=17 (after sync test), avg_score=5.1, farmers_assessed=18
PASS: REDD+ level_distribution: Intermediaire=11, Avance=3, Debutant=2
PASS: REDD+ practices_adoption: Agroforesterie=61%, Compostage=61%, Couverture sol=83%, Zero brulage=78%
PASS: SSRTE total_visits=18 (after sync test), children_identified=20, coverage_rate=80%
PASS: SSRTE risk_distribution: critique=2, eleve=4, modere=4, faible=8
PASS: ICI total_cases=7, resolved=3, in_progress=2, resolution_rate=42.9%
PASS: Subscription Banner shows 'Essai Gratuit Pro' with 179 days remaining
PASS: KPI Strip shows 20 Membres Actifs
PASS: REDD+ Widget shows Score Moyen (4.9), Visites Terrain (17), Producteurs (18)
PASS: REDD+ Widget shows Distribution REDD+ bars with all 5 levels
PASS: REDD+ Widget shows Adoption des Pratiques with 4 practice bars
PASS: SSRTE Widget shows Visites (18), Enfants (20), Couverture (80%)
PASS: SSRTE Widget shows 4 Risk Distribution badges with correct colors
PASS: SSRTE Widget shows ICI Remediation section (7 Cas, 3 Resolus, 2 En cours, 42.9%)
PASS: Sync test - POST /api/redd/tracking/visit increments dashboard REDD visits
PASS: Sync test - POST /api/ssrte/visits/create increments dashboard SSRTE visits
PASS: All data-testid attributes present and working
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - REDD visits ~17, SSRTE visits ~18, ICI cases 7 (counts increased by sync tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 83 verified REDD+, SSRTE, ICI KPIs with REAL seed data. The test user (admin) can access cooperative dashboard. Sync tests created 1 REDD+ visit and 1 SSRTE visit, so counts are now 17 and 18 respectively. All widgets display real data with correct formatting. The subscription is Trial with Pro features (179 days remaining). All data-testid attributes work correctly for automated testing.
